2.title: Total space
2.query:
timeseries totalSpace = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.sql-oracle.tablespaces.totalSpace),
  by: { dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance }
| fieldsAdd sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(totalSpace) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Free space
3.query:
timeseries freeSpace = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.sql-oracle.tablespaces.freeSpace),
  by: { dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance }
| fieldsAdd sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(freeSpace) desc
| limit 20
